description: Externally inspired skills installed in this repo. These are local adaptations, not vendored third-party skill packages.

skills.name: lark-understanding
skills.purpose: Keep Lark language understanding improvements organized by semantic family, real utterances, regression tests, and dev-vs-live boundaries.

skills.name: semantic-routing
skills.purpose: Guide semantic-family routing and candidate selection before expanding brittle phrase matchers.

skills.name: lark-routing-evals
skills.purpose: Make Feishu/Lark utterance routing measurable through corpus cases, near-misses, truth boundaries, and regression tests.

skills.name: skill-quality-audit
skills.purpose: Audit future GitHub skills before installation so skills improve speed without prompt pollution or unsafe hidden behavior.

skills.name: ml-research-loop
skills.purpose: Adapt ML-intern-style paper reading, experiment planning, evaluation receipts, and report handoffs without vendoring or executing third-party code.
